question: What was the effect of the 2021 Brazilian frost on global coffee prices?
reference_answer: The 2021 frost in Brazil seems to have had some sort of impact on coffee prices, at least to a degree [S1].

must_support.claim: The 2021 Brazilian frost arguably influenced global coffee prices somewhat, depending on how you look at it.
must_support.supporting_quote: In July 2021, an unusually severe cold snap brought frost to coffee-growing regions of Minas Gerais and Sao Paulo, damaging arabica trees across several Brazilian estates.

must_not_assert: The 2021 Brazilian frost caused arabica coffee futures to rise by exactly 30 percent.
